# freeswitch_callcenter_tier (Data Source)

Looks up an existing mod_callcenter tier (queue/agent binding).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_callcenter_tier" "support_4201" {
  queue = "support@192.168.48.143"
  agent = "4201@192.168.48.143"
}

output "tier_level" {
  value = data.freeswitch_callcenter_tier.support_4201.level
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent` (String)
- `queue` (String)

### Read-Only

- `level` (Number)
- `position` (Number)
